arguments.content:
# Technical Weekly Report

**Week:** March 17 - March 23, 2026  
**Team:** Orion Tech Backend Team  
**Report Date:** March 24, 2026  
**Reporter:** Alex Zhang

---

## 1. Completed Items This Week

### API Performance Optimization
- Completed comprehensive API benchmark testing across all core endpoints
- Achieved **23% improvement** in average response time (from 145ms to 112ms)
- Optimized database query patterns for user authentication endpoints
- Updated caching strategy for frequently accessed resources
- Documented benchmark results in `day06/20260323_api_benchmark.json`

### CI/CD Pipeline Enhancements
- Migrated build reporting to new standardized JSON format
- Implemented automated CI build report generation with timestamp tracking
- Fixed timezone handling issues in build logs (now using +08:00 CST consistently)
- Created validation scripts for build report schema compliance

### Code Quality & Standards
- Established file naming convention: `YYYYMMDD_snake_case.ext`
- Enforced date-first prefix requirement across all project artifacts
- Updated team documentation with naming best practices

### API Review & Documentation
- Conducted API review meeting on March 23 (meeting notes organized)
- Documented API change proposals for v2.3 release
- Prepared change notification drafts for product management team

---

## 2. Issues Encountered

| Issue | Impact | Status |
|-------|--------|--------|
| Inconsistent timezone handling in legacy logs | Medium | Resolved - standardized to CST (+08:00) |
| Missing period_start/period_end in some benchmark files | Low | Identified - fix in progress |
| Empty time fields violating P1 requirements | Medium | Fixed - validation added |
| File naming inconsistencies across directories | Low | Resolved - convention documented |

### Key Challenges
- **Data Validation:** Discovered that empty time fields in JSON reports violate Priority 1 requirements regardless of file naming correctness
- **Legacy Migration:** Older benchmark files need retroactive updates to match new schema standards
- **Cross-team Coordination:** API changes require PM notification before deployment

---

## 3. Plans for Next Week (March 24 - March 30, 2026)

### Sprint 8 Development
- Write complete technical specification document for Sprint 8 features
- Begin implementation of rate limiting middleware
- Design new authentication flow architecture

### Documentation & Communication
- Finalize and send API change notification to PM team
- Complete meeting notes documentation from API review
- Update API documentation for v2.3 changes

### Testing & Quality Assurance
- Implement automated schema validation in CI pipeline
- Retroactively fix legacy benchmark files with missing fields
- Conduct load testing for optimized endpoints

### Technical Debt
- Refactor legacy logging utilities to use standardized timezone
- Clean up deprecated API endpoints (scheduled for removal in v2.4)

---

## 4. Metrics Summary

| Metric | This Week | Target | Status |
|--------|-----------|--------|--------|
| API Avg Response Time | 112ms | <150ms | ✅ Exceeds |
| CI Build Success Rate | 98.2% | >95% | ✅ Exceeds |
| Code Coverage | 87% | >85% | ✅ Exceeds |
| Open Issues | 12 | <20 | ✅ On Track |

---

## 5. Notes & Follow-ups

- **Action Required:** PM notification email needs final review before sending
- **Meeting Scheduled:** Architecture review for Sprint 8 - March 26, 2026
- **Dependency:** API v2.3 deployment blocked until PM approval received

---

*Report generated: 2026-03-24*  
*Next report: 2026-03-31*
